task:
Import /home/user/Pictures/landscape_luma.jpg into the darktable library.

Enable the 'exposure' module at about +1 EV with a parametric mask that restricts the effect to midtones only using the luma range sliders (shadow and highlight endpoints pulled in so mostly the middle luminance range is affected). Apply the tag 'param_masked' to the image, set its star rating to 4 stars, and export it as a JPEG to /home/user/Pictures/landscape_luma_masked.jpg.

verification.description: exposure module applied (parametric mask lives inside exposure's blendop)
